title: Adela Mag - Inginer SW
about.name: Nume:
about.first: Inginer software cu experiență în industria auto ca Model-Based Tester, cu accent pe validarea, verificarea și calitatea software-ului pentru sisteme complexe.
about.second: Pasionată de crearea de interfețe utilizator adaptive și intuitive folosind JavaScript, HTML și CSS. Familiară cu tool-uri moderne de build cum ar fi Webpack și cu elemente de bază pe partea de backend, inclusiv Node.js și comunicarea client–server.
about.third: Deschisă pentru oportunități atât în software, cât și în hardware, creând soluții eficiente și fiabile.
experience.description_1: Principalele taskuri în acest rol au inclus automatizarea testării software în Matlab/Simulink, îmbunătățirea metodelor de modelare și specificare a cazurilor de test în conformitate cu ASIL D, optimizarea proceselor de testare, execuția și raportarea testelor, precum și urmărirea problemelor identificate.
experience.description_2: Activitățile mele în cadrul MBD Academy au inclus învățarea procesului V-Model, dobândirea de cunoștințe despre arhitectura software AUTOSAR, introducere în standardul industrial Automotive SPICE și instruire în proiectarea modelelor Matlab/Simulink.
experience.master_degree.specialization: Specializare în Circuite și Sisteme Integrate
portfolio.title: Portofoliu
portfolio.subtitle: Cele mai noi proiecte
portfolio.my_cv.title: CV-ul meu
portfolio.my_cv.part1: Acest proiect este primul meu proiect complex din modulul Website Building de la Link Academy. Este un site web de tip CV construit cu HTML, CSS, JavaScript și Webpack. Am folosit Bootstrap pentru design responsiv și am adăugat efecte vizuale cu ajutorul unor biblioteci. Am folosit Figma pentru editarea imaginilor și logo-ul.
portfolio.my_cv.feature3: Buton de întoarcere la începutul paginii
portfolio.flowershop.title: Online Flowershop - One page project
portfolio.flowershop.part1: This is a modern online flower shop website with a responsive design. The site uses Vite for fast development and Bootstrap for styling.
portfolio.flowershop.part2: It includes animations with AOS when you scroll. There is also a dark mode toggle that users can switch on or off.
portfolio.flowershop.part3: The website has the following sections: Home, About, Plans, Services, Portfolio, Testimonials, Contact.
portfolio.flowershop.part4: The project is built with HTML templates and has a clean, professional look for selling flowers online.
portfolio.phonebook.title: Phonebook App
portfolio.phonebook.part1: The Phonebook Application is a JavaScript-based web application that allows users to store, display, and manage contact information. The application enables users to save names along with their corresponding phone numbers and view them in an organized list.
portfolio.phonebook.part2: The user interface is divided into two main sections:
portfolio.phonebook.feature1: A form for adding new contacts, which includes input fields for the contact's name and phone number, along with a submit button.
portfolio.phonebook.feature2: A list that displays all saved contacts in a clear and organized manner.
portfolio.phonebook.part3: The Phonebook Application is implemented using React, with Vite used as the development and build tool.
portfolio.web_design.title: Web Design
portfolio.web_design.part1: This website presents a demo company through a modern and consistent design created in Figma.
portfolio.web_design.part2: The Home page includes the company name, a short description, and a representative visual, while the Products page displays offerings with images, titles, brief descriptions, and category navigation.
portfolio.web_design.part3: The Contact page provides a simple form and location information. All pages are connected through interactive prototyping and follow consistent design rules for colors, typography, and layout.
portfolio.canvas_clock.title: Canvas Clock
portfolio.canvas_clock.part1: Canvas Clock is a web application developed using HTML5 Canvas API and JavaScript that displays an animated analog clock. The clock shows the current time by updating the position of the hour, minute, and second hands based on the system time.
portfolio.canvas_clock.part2: The project uses basic 2D canvas drawing techniques and mathematical calculations to position elements correctly. It demonstrates fundamental concepts of real-time rendering and animation in web development.
portfolio.circle_animation.title: Circle Animation
portfolio.circle_animation.part1: The project represents an animated circle created entirely with HTML and CSS, showcasing advanced techniques learned in the CSS module.
portfolio.circle_animation.part2: The animation uses linear gradients, CSS filters, CSS animations, 2D transformations, and pseudo-elements.
portfolio.circle_animation.part3: The glowing effect behind the animated circle follows its colors for a dynamic visual impact.
